3174610.name: Cone Flyers Mercenaries Demo
3174610.description:
The demo for the epic upcoming game: Cone Flyers Mercenaries

In this demo you can play through four dungeons from the main game:
The first dungeon
One from the Milksop Moistlands planet
One from the Gloomfall Grotto planet
One from the Derelict Dusthouse planet

In these dungeons you'll need to fight many dangerous enemies and avoid their attacks in bullet-hell style fashion, each dungeon features it's own boss and unique hazards to over come.

This demo features two weapons:
Blaster: standard primary weapon, use it to shoot enemies
Burst: a secondary weapon, use it to fire a blast of 16 bullets around you

In each dungeon you will be ranked on your performance! Can you get an S rank every dungeon?
3174610.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
